sentences.text_original: 你平时喜欢用什么方式交朋友？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ píngshí xǐhuān yòng shénme fāngshì jiāo péngyou?
sentences.text_translation: Odatda do'st orttirishni qaysi usulda yoqtirasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Каким способом ты обычно любишь заводить друзей?
sentences.text_translation_en: How do you usually like to make friends?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我最近开始用社交软件交朋友。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zuìjìn kāishǐ yòng shèjiāo ruǎnjiàn jiāo péngyou.
sentences.text_translation: Yaqinda ijtimoiy tarmoq ilovalari orqali do'st orttira boshladim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В последнее время я начал заводить друзей через соцсети.
sentences.text_translation_en: I recently started making friends through social apps.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 只要小心一些，应该没问题。
sentences.pinyin: Zhǐyào xiǎoxīn yì xiē, yīnggāi méi wèntí.
sentences.text_translation: Bir oz ehtiyot bo'lsang bo'lgani, muammo bo'lmasligi kerak.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Если быть немного осторожнее, проблем быть не должно.
sentences.text_translation_en: As long as you're a bit careful, it should be fine.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yùdào guo yǒuqù de rén ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Have you come across any interesting people?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 遇到过。上个月我认识了一个喜欢摄影的朋友。
sentences.pinyin: Yùdào guo. Shàng ge yuè wǒ rènshi le yí ge xǐhuān shèyǐng de péngyou.
sentences.text_translation: Duch kelganman. O'tgan oy fotografiyani yaxshi ko'radigan bir do'st bilan tanishdim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Встречались. В прошлом месяце я познакомился с человеком, который любит фотографию.
sentences.text_translation_en: I have. Last month I met a friend who loves photography.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: Have you two met in person?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 还没有。但是我们已经聊了很多次了。
sentences.pinyin: Hái méiyǒu. Dànshì wǒmen yǐjīng liáo le hěn duō cì le.
sentences.text_translation: Hali yo'q. Lekin allaqachon ko'p marta suhbatlashganmiz.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ещё нет. Но мы уже много раз общались.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not yet. But we've already chatted many times.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 聊生活、电影、旅行。我们有很多共同话题。
sentences.pinyin: Liáo shēnghuó, diànyǐng, lǚxíng. Wǒmen yǒu hěn duō gòngtóng huàtí.
sentences.text_translation: Hayot, kino, sayohat haqida. Bizda umumiy mavzular ko'p.
sentences.text_translation_ru: О жизни, фильмах, путешествиях. У нас много общих тем.
sentences.text_translation_en: About life, films, travel. We have a lot of common topics.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你觉得网上认识的朋友可靠吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ juéde wǎngshàng rènshi de péngyou kěkào ma?
sentences.text_translation: Seningcha internetda tanishgan do'st ishonchli bo'ladimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Как ты думаешь, друзья из интернета надёжны?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you think friends you meet online are reliable?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不一定。要聊久一点才能判断。
sentences.pinyin: Bù yídìng. Yào liáo jiǔ yì diǎn cáinéng pànduàn.
sentences.text_translation: Har doim emas. Birozroq uzoq suhbatlashib ko'rgachgina baho berish mumkin.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не обязательно. Чтобы судить, нужно пообщаться подольше.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not necessarily. You can only judge after chatting for a while.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你有告诉家人这件事吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yǒu gàosu jiārén zhè jiàn shì ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Have you told your family about this?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 有。我妈有点担心，但是我跟她说我会小心。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu. Wǒ mā yǒu diǎn dānxīn, dànshì wǒ gēn tā shuō wǒ huì xiǎoxīn.
sentences.text_translation: Aytdim. Onam biroz xavotirlandi, lekin men unga ehtiyot bo'lishimni aytdim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Рассказал. Мама немного переживает, но я сказал ей, что буду осторожен.
sentences.text_translation_en: I have. My mom is a little worried, but I told her I'd be careful.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: When do you plan to meet up?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 可能下个月吧。我们会选择公共场所见面。
sentences.pinyin: Kěnéng xià ge yuè ba. Wǒmen huì xuǎnzé gōnggòng chǎngsuǒ jiànmiàn.
sentences.text_translation: Ehtimol keyingi oy. Uchrashish uchun jamoat joyini tanlaymiz.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Наверное, в следующем месяце. Мы выберем для встречи общественное место.
sentences.text_translation_en: Probably next month. We'll choose a public place to meet.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那比较安全。祝你交到好朋友！
sentences.pinyin: Nà bǐjiào ānquán. Zhù nǐ jiāo dào hǎo péngyou!
sentences.text_translation: Bu ancha xavfsiz. Yaxshi do'st orttirishingni tilayman!
sentences.text_translation_ru: Так безопаснее. Желаю тебе найти хорошего друга!
sentences.text_translation_en: That's safer. Hope you make a good friend!
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 谢谢！如果见面顺利，我告诉你。
sentences.pinyin: Xièxie! Rúguǒ jiànmiàn shùnlì, wǒ gàosu nǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Rahmat! Uchrashuv yaxshi o'tsa, senga aytaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Спасибо! Если встреча пройдёт хорошо, расскажу тебе.
sentences.text_translation_en: Thanks! If the meeting goes well, I'll let you know.
sentences.speaker: B
